authenticatedUploadResultSummary: Remediated on 2026-05-21. The worker-aware staging smoke registered/logged in a synthetic consumer, uploaded a generated TransUnion PDF, verified artifact ownership, polled ingest status to completed, retrieved owner upload-results with 2 tradelines and 6 actionable findings, proved non-owner denial with HTTP 403, and cleaned up both synthetic users. production-scale:certify now includes and passed the authenticatedUploadResults gate.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Serve the app shell over HTTPS.
Create a synthetic user, authenticate, and resolve role user.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Post-fix smoke created owner user 136 and certification smoke created owner user 138; both resolved role user and cleaned up.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Record non-secret session/user proof in smoke evidence.

functionResults.functionName: Consumer credit report upload artifact creation
functionResults.expectedBehavior: Accept generated PDF, create owner-scoped report artifact, return artifactId.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: reportArtifact row, stored artifact reference, pending/ready status
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Artifact can be processed and later retrieved by owner.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Post-fix smoke proved artifact 478 ownerUserId 136; certification smoke proved artifact 479 ownerUserId 138.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep artifact ownership assertion in authenticated upload-results smoke.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Enqueue durable job, worker claims and completes, status reaches completed or explicit terminal failure.

functionResults.evidenceCollected: Post-fix smoke polled job 27 queued_waiting_for_worker to completed/succeeded; certification smoke polled job 28 queued/running to completed/succeeded.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep terminal status polling and no-worker/stale failure handling in the smoke.

commandsRun.summary: Build, golden path, unit suite, deterministic ingestion, parser regression, tradeline internal, and violation correction checks passed.
Pre-patch reproduction failed with Expected at least 2 synthetic tradelines, found 0.
Artifact 478 owned by user 136; job 27 completed; owner upload-results returned 2 tradelines and actionableCount 6; non-owner denied 403; users 136 and 137 deleted.
CERTIFYING:true; authenticatedUploadResults gate passed with artifact 479, owner 138, job 28 completed, 2 tradelines, non-owner 403, cleanup users 138 and 139 deleted.

testsAdded: tests/unit/staging-auth-workflow-smoke.spec.ts updated for queued process output, terminal status classification, artifact/status endpoints, and packet opt-in behavior

criticalFailures.title: Authenticated staging consumer upload did not produce usable results
criticalFailures.evidence: Post-fix smoke passed: artifact 478 owner 136, job 27 completed, upload-results returned 2 tradelines and actionableCount 6, non-owner denied 403.

criticalFailures.title: Production-scale certification omitted the authenticated upload-to-results smoke
criticalFailures.evidence: scripts/production-scale-certification.mjs now includes authenticatedUploadResults and production-scale:certify passed with CERTIFYING:true.

criticalFailures.title: Authenticated smoke did not poll worker-backed ingest status to terminal state
criticalFailures.evidence: staging-auth-workflow-smoke now polls /_api/ingest/status and fails on failed/manual_review_required/stalled_no_worker_heartbeat/stale/timeout before reading upload-results.

criticalFailures.title: Packet-included staging auth smoke hit packet PDF HTTP 502 after upload-results succeeded
criticalFailures.evidence: Two remediation runs reached terminal completed ingest and then failed at packet PDF HTTP 502; packet PDF local cache-miss proof passed.

remediationTasks.prompt: Diagnose the packet PDF HTTP 502 observed only after authenticated staging upload-results succeeds. Run CRP_AUTH_WORKFLOW_SMOKE_INCLUDE_PACKET=true, inspect packet PDF endpoint logs/cache behavior, patch the smallest packet/PDF or staging gateway defect, and preserve existing packet output.
Add an automated Playwright smoke for /upload and /upload-results using a synthetic authenticated user, proving clear queued/processing/stalled/failed/completed UI states with no manual interaction.
Add a synthetic admin role smoke for correction, evidence, regulation, parser-test, and queue dashboard surfaces without real PII or broad production mutation.

unverifiedAreas.reason: API/runtime proof now passes, but no browser automation was added in this bounded remediation.

unverifiedAreas.area: Live staging packet PDF within auth workflow
unverifiedAreas.reason: Packet-included smoke hit HTTP 502 after upload-results success; packet PDF local proof passes and live packet remediation remains separate.
Inventoried and mapped to tests, but not staged with a synthetic admin in this remediation.

unverifiedAreas.area: Live external providers and live deploy
unverifiedAreas.reason: Explicitly out of scope; no live external calls or deploys were run.

remediationAddendum.rootCause: The authenticated staging smoke treated /_api/ingest/process as synchronously complete even though staging correctly returns a queued worker-backed state. It queried upload-results before worker completion.

remainingBlockers.title: Packet-included staging auth smoke hit packet PDF HTTP 502 after upload-results succeeded
remainingBlockers.notes: Packet PDF is outside the P0 upload-results proof and remains covered by packet-pdf:cache-miss-proof; live staging packet PDF should be diagnosed separately if release-critical.
